user_query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node_data.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node_data.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Explicitly an outdoor nature activity: ferry to Toronto Islands plus bike rental and exploration, beaches and gardens — allows getting outside.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 8 > Niagara Falls Day Trip

node_data.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node_data.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Full-day outdoor scenic excursion to Niagara Falls (boat ride and time to explore the falls) — clearly an outdoor nature activity.

node_data.name: Harbourfront Stroll
node_data.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Harbourfront Stroll is an outdoor walk along the waterfront with fresh air and lake views — suitable for getting outside.
